verses.1: For the music director. A Psalm of David. LORD, in Your strength the king will be glad, And in Your salvation how greatly he will rejoice!
verses.2: You have given him his heart’s desire, And You have not withheld the request of his lips. Selah
verses.3: For You meet him with the blessings of good things; You set a crown of pure gold on his head.
verses.4: He asked for life from You, You gave it to him, Length of days forever and ever.
verses.5: His glory is great through Your salvation, Splendor and majesty You place upon him.
verses.6: For You make him most blessed forever; You make him joyful with the joy of Your presence.
verses.7: For the king trusts in the LORD, And through the faithfulness of the Most High he will not be shaken.
verses.8: Your hand will find all your enemies; Your right hand will find those who hate you.
verses.9: You will make them as a fiery oven in the time of your anger; The LORD will swallow them up in His wrath, And fire will devour them.
verses.10: You will eliminate their descendants from the earth, And their children from among the sons of mankind.
verses.11: Though they intended evil against You And devised a plot, They will not succeed.
verses.12: For You will make them turn their back; You will take aim at their faces with Your bowstrings.
verses.13: Be exalted, LORD, in Your strength; We will sing and praise Your power.
